    Hierarchy For All Packages

    Package Hierarchies:
    • application,
    • entity,
    • entity.base,
    • entity.containers,
    • entity.ingredients,
    • gui,
    • gui.components,
    • gui.room,
    • logic,
    • logic.counters,
    • logic.menus,
    • sprites,
    • util,
    • util.wrapper

    Class Hierarchy

    • java.lang.Object
      • java.util.AbstractCollection<E> (implements java.util.Collection<E>)
        • java.util.AbstractList<E> (implements java.util.List<E>)
          • java.util.ArrayList<E> (implements java.lang.Cloneable, java.util.List<E>, java.util.RandomAccess, java.io.Serializable)
            • util.wrapper.BackgroundMusicTrack
      • javafx.application.Application
        • application.Main
      • logic.counters.BaseCounter
        • logic.counters.ChoppingBoardCounter (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.Counter
        • logic.counters.DeepFryer (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.IceCreamMachine (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.Mixer (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.Oven (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.Pot (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.ServeCounter
        • logic.counters.StoveCounter (implements logic.Updatable)
        • logic.counters.WaterDispenser (implements logic.Updatable)
      • entity.base.BaseItem
        • entity.base.BaseContainer
          • entity.containers.Bowl
          • entity.containers.Plate
          • entity.containers.Tray
        • entity.base.BaseIngredient
          • entity.ingredients.Bacon (implements entity.Grillable)
          • entity.ingredients.Cone (implements entity.IceCreamable)
          • entity.ingredients.Dough (implements entity.Bakable, entity.Boilable, entity.Choppable)
          • entity.ingredients.Egg (implements entity.Boilable, entity.Choppable, entity.Grillable)
          • entity.ingredients.Lettuce (implements entity.Choppable)
          • entity.ingredients.MashedPotato
          • entity.ingredients.Milk
          • entity.ingredients.Potato (implements entity.Boilable, entity.Choppable, entity.Fryable, entity.Mixable)
          • entity.ingredients.SlicedBread (implements entity.IceCreamable)
          • entity.ingredients.Tomato (implements entity.Choppable, entity.Mixable)
          • entity.ingredients.TomatoSauce
          • entity.ingredients.WheatFlour (implements entity.Mixable, entity.Waterable)
      • logic.menus.BaseMenu
        • logic.menus.BaconSalad (implements logic.menus.RequireContainer)
        • logic.menus.BreadLoaf
        • logic.menus.BreakfastSet (implements logic.menus.RequireContainer)

        • logic.menus.IceCreamCone (implements logic.menus.DetailedMenu)
        • logic.menus.IceCreamSandwich (implements logic.menus.DetailedMenu)
        • logic.menus.IceCreamSet (implements logic.menus.DetailedMenu)
        • logic.menus.Sandwich (implements logic.menus.DetailedMenu)
        • logic.menus.SatisfactoryMeal (implements logic.menus.RequireContainer)
        • logic.menus.Spaghetti (implements logic.menus.RequireContainer)
      • util.BGMManager
      • util.DialogManager
      • logic.GameInstance
      • javafx.scene.Node (implements javafx.event.EventTarget, javafx.css.Styleable)
        • javafx.scene.image.ImageView
          • sprites.AnimatedSprite
          • gui.components.FoodOrder
          • sprites.ItemSprite

          • javafx.scene.layout.Region

    Enum Class Hierarchy

      • java.lang.Enum<E> (implements java.lang.Comparable<T>, java.lang.constant.Constable, java.io.Serializable)
